description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 1st; Slot feet; Price 1,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These high-soled blue boots provide a great deal of comfort and arch support while also making the wearer appear a little bit taller than normal. The bootâs wearer always takes the minimum possible damage from falls (as if the GM had rolled a 1 on each die of damage incurred by the fall) and at the end of a fall always lands on his feet. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, feather fall; Cost 500 gp.
